title: IH Engineers
description:
IH Engineers, P.C. is a consulting firm with over 25 years of experience, dedicated to providin
g innovative and technically excellent services in design, construction, and structural evaluat
ion. The firm operates primarily in New Jersey, New York, and Pennsylvania, serving a diverse r
ange of clients.

We will upload 65gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal docs (passports, SSNs, DLs and ot
her HR information), confidential internal files, NDAs, projects, contracts and agreements, dra
wings and so on.
